text.title: Cross-Platform Token Distribution Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end example applying Cross-Platform Token Distribution to a concrete case.

section.title: Three-platform color primary token

example.code:
## tokens.json (DTCG) ``` { "color": { "text": { "primary": { "$value": "#1c1c1e", "$type": "color" } } } } ```
## Outputs - web-css: --color-text-primary: #1c1c1e; - ios-swift: static let colorTextPrimary = UIColor(hex: "#1c1c1e") - android-xml: <color name="color_text_primary">#1c1c1e</color> - tailwind: theme.extend.colors.text.primary = '#1c1c1e'
All four derive from the same canonical entry; semantic name preserved.

section.note: One canonical edit → four platform outputs; CI blocks hand-edits in dist/.
